gates.condition: Sources are listed and mapped to material claims.
Decision packet includes evidence, risks, and unsupported claims.

objective: Research a question and produce an evidence-bound decision packet.

required_agents.execution_spec: Create a source plan before evidence collection and block when the scope is incomplete.
required_agents.output_spec: Research plan with scope, source criteria, evidence requirements, and acceptance gates.
required_agents.role_spec: Define research scope, source criteria, and decision questions.

required_agents.execution_spec: Map material claims to evidence and fail closed when evidence is missing.
required_agents.output_spec: Evidence matrix, unsupported claim list, risk notes, and decision packet.
required_agents.role_spec: Review claims against collected evidence and identify unsupported claims.
